deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. Close May 1, 2026. Building branded analysis template.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report, build first analysis sheet, lock template

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Listing canceled, signs picked up. Isaac Linares development concept ($150K offer) did not move forward. No path forward with sisters.

logs.m: Listing canceled - walking away from this deal. Signs picked up from property last week.
Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development concept - half units for veterans, half for profit. $150K offer contingent on project moving forward.
Showing occurred. Sisters excited about Isaac development interest.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back into property to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist when ready. Relationship intact, ended on good terms.

logs.m: Listing terminated - Matt and Chandler moving back in. Plan to update and relist later.
Call with Matt and Chandler at 11am. Honest conversation on financial picture. Chandler laid off. Short sale likely path. Clients still confident in Chris.
Where Things Stand email sent. Market analysis: carrying cost $5-6K+/mo. Option 3 highlighted at $518,999.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell - Buyer
deals.notes: Pivoted from new construction. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal via Isaac Linares at $85K. FHA 203(k) for rehab. Two structures - one livable, one teardown. Zach Schaphorst evaluating financing.
deals.next: Follow up with Zach on 203(k) feasibility. Mike and Isaac phone call today. Loop in LT on financing or alternate buyer.

logs.m: Isaac brought wholesale deal at 301 W Saxet, Corpus Christi at $85K. Mike and Alice connected with Isaac. Mike and Isaac scheduled to talk today.
Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy - new construction search platform.
Text from Mike - rental being sold. 916 Marriott assessed and passed. Pivoting to new construction strategy.

deals.title: Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: Going through divorce, need to sell. 3/2, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K (Feb 2026). Realistic market $275-315K. CMA completed May 15. Listing agreement pending.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property ~10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17. CMA pulled - thin market. Built listing presentation.
Prior clients - Chris helped with original VA renovation loan purchase. Divorce situation. Looking for contractor work.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed May 14. 3BR/2.5BA, 1886 sqft, Laura Heights PUD. Sellers relocating to NC - June deadline. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Pre-inspection completed. Insurance claim for roof moving forward.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time (May 30). Follow up with second-look buyers agent. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back - their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Next showing May 30.
Investor cash offer discussed at $176,300. Texted Jose and Katy, keeping conversation open.
MLS live. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing - cultural concern about street direction. MK asking for preinspection.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash sale $152,000. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Closed and funded Apr 26-27. Commission received.
deals.next: Joy gift basket and rug delivery pending. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel and Michael (notary).

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo. Delivered to Chicago Title. Unblocked deal.
Contract executed. $152,000 cash offer.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac - Steven Jimenez
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113,000. Buyer agent Javier. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment. Chicago Title handling escrow (Alyssa Castillo).
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not yet received. Another agent interested with backup buyers.
Steve signed amendment. TXR 1404 uploaded. MLS updated to $117,500. Price reduction in effect.
Property clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer (Michael Rodriguez) dead - no EMD received.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751 - Priority Bank REO
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Cleanup in progress - floor demo complete, drywall cut for electrician/plumber. Matt Toney (HouzzPro) contractor. New utilities being set up (Medina Electric, EMCSUD). Police reports stalled. Listing agreement still needed.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD to confirm utility status. Replace camera batteries. Police report follow-up. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Kelly got mileage approved - ACH payment processing.
Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. New drywall on site ready. Utilities confirmed. Transformer number to grab for electric application.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss - Rental (Jimbo)
deals.notes: Rental listing arrangement concluded. Jimbo backed out. Chris sent $500 to cover costs. Ended on good terms with professional release signed.
deals.next: Confirm signed release received from Jimbo.

logs.m: Release sent to Jimbo. Payment received. Relationship intact, closed out clean.
Jimbo backed out of rental listing. Chris sent $500 to cover time and money invested.

deals.title: Moran - New Construction Buyer
deals.notes: New construction buyer. Rental arrangement with Jimbo backed out. Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1000/mo payment. Skyslope listing needs clearing. Need to confirm interest level with Brandon.
deals.next: Ask Brandon what is going on with Milagros timeline and interest level. MI Homes option from Frank still in play.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. Skyslope listing needs to be cleared out.
Follow up with Milagros - ask Brandon about timeline and interest level. MI Homes option in play.
MI Homes (Frank) - found home option under $1200/mo. Multiple builder options being worked.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden community. Grief to healing story with plants. Potential content collaboration (permission pending). Real estate potential long-term.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story on social media.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Investor met in person. Full intake pending. Buy box unknown. Area of interest likely Schertz. Multiple active deals (3504 Painted Riv analysis, Borregas development, 301 W Saxet wholesale). Strong relationship forming.
leads.next: Full Sage intake - buy box, budget, timeline, strategy. Add to Bold Trail. Connect on active deals.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St she plans to sell soon. Currently working with another realtor. Property ~90% complete - having trouble finishing. Open to selling as-is. Pre-market opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing work progress. Offer to promote listing to network. If she stalls, revisit as-is conversation.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor directly behind her may have passed away. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener (plants on fence). Son not yet contacted. Probate or inherited property opportunity.
leads.next: Get son name and contact from Miss Pat. Reach out - introduce as neighbor and gardener first. Assess if keeping, renting, or selling.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 (Priority Bank property) May 11. Bryce is dumpster contractor. His wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility - confirm branch, service status. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner - Buyer
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner (downline agent, Schertz/Cibolo). Has buyer interested in property needing work - unique situation. Details pending from May 11 conversation.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property they want. Understand financing and type of work needed.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: (1) Uncle Jimbo rental setup at 8527 Green Bliss (Grace Gardens) - Lennar home rent for 2 years then occupy. (2) Mom Milagros Stringer new construction buyer - budget $50K down, target ~$1000/mo payment.
leads.next: Confirm Mom Milagros interest level and timeline with Brandon. Pull new construction options. Lock in builder registration for Milagros before any visits.

leads.title: Kurt - Neighbor Prospect
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Wants intel on offers received and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area ASAP. Set up listing timeline. Follow up on 9815 Conbes offer details. Report back to Kurt.

priorities.title: Mill Path Showings - Jose Arango
priorities.notes: 10023 Mill Path, San Antonio. Buyers came back for second showing - their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Next showing May 30 (time TBD). Second-look buyers are strongest lead for offer.

Follow up with second-look buyers agent on movement after preinspection
Monitor for backup offer submission from other agent
